arxiv.title: Exchange identities and symmetric slices of the valley Delta conjecture

claim.label: Conjecture 8.2 refined scaffold exchange, bounded area two at (n,M)=(6,5)
claim.scope: Only the exact finite target m=0^(n-2)1^2, n=6, label alphabet bound M=5 is settled; the all-parameter conjecture remains open.

source_statement_boundary: Conjecture 8.2 and the area-two discussion in Section 8.2; bounded target specification is pinned in the public packet.
